# pai clear-names

> Recovery: wipe corrupted iTerm2 session name state.

Clears ~/.aibroker/session-names.json AND user.paiName from all live iTerm2 sessions.
After running this, use /Name to re-label each tab.

## Synopsis

```
pai clear-names [options]
```

## Options

| Option | Description | Default |
|--------|-------------|---------|
| `--dry-run` | Preview what would be cleared without making changes |  |
